episodes.title: Southern Native Americans Kingdoms, Cults, and Civilizations  - Ancient DNA Hub
episodes.description:
Long before European ships reached the Americas, South America was home to some of the world's most remarkable civilizations. Across towering Andean mountains, dense Amazonian forests, windswept Patagonian plains, and fertile coastal valleys, countless peoples developed unique cultures, built monumental cities, cultivated crops, and created vast trade networks that connected the continent.

The Southern Native Americans: Kingdoms, Cults, and Civilizations test from Ancient DNA Hub lets you explore your genetic connection to real ancient populations from South America. Unlike standard DNA tests that rely mainly on modern reference groups, this test uses ancient DNA recovered from archaeological remains to investigate affinity to the peoples who shaped the continent over thousands of years.

Archaeology and ancient DNA reveal an extraordinary history of migration and adaptation. The first settlers crossed into the Americas during the last Ice Age and gradually expanded southward, eventually reaching even the distant landscapes of Patagonia. Over thousands of years, these populations diversified into societies ranging from hunter-gatherers of the southern cone to complex agricultural civilizations that cultivated maize, potatoes, quinoa, beans, and squash.

The continent gave rise to powerful kingdoms and sacred traditions. Monumental adobe pyramids rose along the Pacific coast, while highland societies built sophisticated stone cities and ceremonial centers. The greatest of these empires was the Inca, whose vast realm stretched nearly four thousand kilometers along the Andes from modern Ecuador to central Chile. Earlier cultures, including the Moche, Nazca, Wari, Tiwanaku, and Chachapoya, left behind spectacular temples, geoglyphs, irrigation systems, and royal tombs that continue to reveal the richness of South America's past.

Ancient DNA provides a direct connection to these remarkable peoples, allowing you to compare your own genetic heritage with individuals who lived centuries or even millennia ago. Rather than looking only at recent ancestry, this test explores the deeper human story of migration, survival, and civilization across one of the world's most diverse continents.

With this test, you can go beyond modern ancestry and discover whether your genetic roots connect to the ancient kingdoms, sacred traditions, and first peoples of South America.

Discover your connection to the Southern Native Americans:
https://www.ancientdnahub.com/Amerindians-of-South-America
